_comment: Frozen canary set per P5C_AMENDMENT_2.md H4. Committed, not regenerated per-run. Selected 2026-07-22: easy joins/duplicates require BOTH partners to have n_attested_signs > 40 (revised after an initial pick that only checked the query side produced degenerate tiny-partner pairs, caught by T3 failing on first run -- see h2_audit_report.md / p5c2_report.md); random_non_pairs = seeded-random dev-side fragment pairs verified NOT to be joins/duplicates/same-parent, and disjoint from the easy_joins/duplicates fragments.
